---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new diagram type, option, or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like?

A clear description of the feature or improvement.

## Motivation / use case

Why is this useful? What are you trying to render?

## Example

If it relates to a Mermaid feature, include the Mermaid source and how you would
expect it to look in the terminal.

## Alternatives

Any workarounds you currently use.
